package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerHotPathOptimizationTimeNowCalledManyTimesPerItem() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_hot_path_optimization_time_now_called_many_times_per_item"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Hot path optimization. Flag repeated time.Now calls inside per-item loops where one timestamp would suffice."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
